Title: Capture voice input
Status: Code Present
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-22
Milestone: Chatbot, voice, and module flows

As a module user
I want voice input in OliverDock
So that I can dictate a request instead of typing it

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] The dock exposes a microphone action when browser speech recognition is available.
- [ ] Recognized speech is routed into the chat request flow.

Notes: Implemented with browser speech recognition; cross-browser support was not verified.
